channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Sotheby's settles with New York for $6.25M over tax fraud
item.description: The iconic New York City auction house Sotheby's agreed to pay over $6 for allegedly helping clients avoid millions in sales tax.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Northeast hit with rain, snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities
item.description: The U.S. Northeast has been hit with a winter storm that has brought rain and snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities and disrupted travel plans for those moving around on the holiday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Is your turkey dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Amazon workers on strike from Black Friday to Cyber Monday
item.description: (WFXR) - Amazons workers across 20 countries, including the United States, are striking against what the organizing labor union calls anti-worker and anti-democratic practices.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Jaxtheimer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California man, who vanished 25 years ago, to reunite with family after picture in news article
item.description: A missing California man will be reunited with his family 25 years following his disappearance after his family recognized him in an online news article.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From disaster to hope: A Vermont family thankful for community support after flood destroyed home
item.description: PEACHAM, Vt. (AP) — The last thing John and Jenny Mackenzie saw as they fled their Vermont home with their daughters, dog and two guinea pigs last summer was their cars upended and propelled away by rushing flood waters.
item.dc:creator: LISA RATHKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Stowaway found on Delta flight from NYC to Paris when plane was about to land: report
item.description: A woman was allegedly caught on a Delta Air Lines flight headed to Paris from New York this week despite not having a valid boarding pass.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs denied bail for a third time
item.description: He was denied bail in September and earlier this month when the judge deemed Combs a flight risk because of his money and connections.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon tribe has hunting and fishing rights restored under a long-sought court ruling
item.description: LINCOLN CITY, Ore. (AP) — Drumming made the floor vibrate and singing filled the conference room of the Chinook Winds Casino Resort in Lincoln City, on the Oregon coast, as hundreds in tribal regalia danced in a circle.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Boulder Police address JonBenét Ramsey's case after Netflix docuseries premieres
item.description: Without specifically addressing the docuseries, Boulder Police called many of the claims in the show "completely false.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, ABC 4

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in NYC: See the balloons inflate before the big day
item.description: The 98th annual Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade will take over Manhattan Thursday morning, lining the streets with extravagant balloons and fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Docs: Ex-Avon choir teacher filmed sexual videos in his classroom, sent them to girls on Snapchat
item.description: AVON, Ind. — A former choir and theater teacher in the Avon school system faces felony charges after allegedly filming himself masturbating in his classroom and sending the videos to teen girls. Kayvon H.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Judge finds New York City in contempt over jail conditions, moves closer to a federal takeover
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge on Wednesday found New York City in contempt for failing to staunch violence and brutality at its jails, a scathing ruling that puts the troubled Rikers Island jail complex on the verge of a federal takeover. In a written decision, U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, MICHAEL R. SISAK and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: A California woman was called into work on her day off. She left a lottery winner
item.description: Nobody likes being called into work on their day off. But for one California woman, a last-minute call-in would ultimately change her life for the better.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump nominees targeted in series of threats, spokesperson says
item.description: (The Hill) - Multiple nominees and appointees tapped to serve in President-elect Trump’s incoming administration were targeted with threats this week, a spokesperson for the transition said Wednesday, though it was unclear how many were affected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KRON4

item.title: Killer wife appears unfazed by life sentence for husband's murder she blamed on daughter
item.description: Laurie Shaver, 41, who killed her husband, buried him in their backyard and tried to blame her 7-year-old daughter, has been sentenced to life in prison.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Armed felon arrested for threatening to kill Trump attended rally weeks after Butler assassination attempt
item.description: Arizona man Manuel Tamayo-Torres charged with lying on federal firearms background check forms and threatening to kill Donald Trump and his family.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Disney agrees to $43 million settlement in gender pay lawsuit
item.description: The agreement settles allegations initially made in a 2019 lawsuit filed by Disney employee LaRonda Rasmussen, who claimed she was getting paid less than her male counterparts in the same role.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KRON4

item.title: Zach Bryan pauses concert, calls out fan for throwing object on stage
item.description: A country music star whose 'argumentative' behavior has got him in hot water before, paused a recent concert after a fan appears to have thrown something onto stage.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, WGN 9

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Trump picks Jay Bhattacharya, who backed COVID herd immunity, to lead National Institutes of Health
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has chosen health economist Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, a critic of pandemic lockdowns and vaccine mandates, to lead the National Institutes of Health, the nation's leading medical research agency.
item.dc:creator: CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dog treats distributed to 19 states recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, Fox 5

item.title: Tim Walz accepts turkey presentation as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — As feathers flew, Tim Walz accepted the symbolic presentation of a turkey Tuesday as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor following the Harris-Walz ticket's defeat in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: HIV-positive organ transplants allowed under new rule
item.description: People with HIV will soon be permitted to receive transplanted kidneys and livers from donors who are also infected with the virus under a new rule approved by the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Repealing no-fault divorce has so far stalled across the US. Some worry that'll change under Trump
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Married couples across the U.S. have had access to no-fault divorce for more than 50 years, an option many call crucial to supporting domestic abuse victims and key to preventing already crowded family courts from drowning in complicated divorce proceedings.
item.dc:creator: KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bird flu detected in raw milk from California, state officials warn
item.description: The avian influenza virus has been detected in a retail sample of raw milk from a California-based raw dairy farm, California health officials confirmed Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Varela, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Should sex abuse evidence set the Menendez brothers free? A judge will decide
item.description: A judge will decide Monday whether new evidence warrants a re-examination of the convictions of Erik and Lyle Menendez in the shotgun murders of their parents in their Beverly Hills home more than 30 years ago.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: GOP senators squirm over sex-related allegations against Trump Cabinet picks
item.description: Republican senators are squirming over the rash of sexual misconduct allegations against President-elect Donald Trump's Cabinet picks, which they fear will become a focal point of Senate confirmation hearings next year.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, ABC 4

item.title: New details emerge on BioLab fire that forced thousands to shelter outside Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Federal authorities have released an update on the investigation into fires at the BioLab chemical plant near Atlanta that produced a toxic chemical cloud and forced nearby residents to shelter in place. The fires broke out Sept.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Zealanders save more than 30 stranded whales by lifting them on sheets
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — More than 30 pilot whales that stranded themselves on a beach in New Zealand were safely returned to the ocean after conservation workers and residents helped to refloat them by lifting them on sheets.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Forecasts warn of possible winter storms across US during Thanksgiving week
item.description: WINDSOR, Calif. (AP) — Another round of wintry weather could complicate travel leading up to the Thanksgiving holiday, according to forecasts across the U.S., while California and Washington state continue to recover from storm damage and power outages.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
